task_completion.description: Verify the professional bookmark folders are created and organized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Bookmark bar or Bookmark Manager displays exactly four folders named 'Merchandise', 'Cemeteries', 'Florists', and 'Vital Statistics'.

task_completion.description: Verify personal bookmarks have been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Bookmark bar and Bookmark Manager do NOT contain any bookmarks for Netflix, Amazon, Facebook, DraftKings, or Reddit.

task_completion.description: Verify browsing history for specific family names is removed while preserving general history.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome History page (chrome://history) shows no entries containing the names Patterson, Smith, Hernandez, or O'Connor, but other general browsing history entries are still present.

task_completion.description: Verify privacy settings for autocomplete and autofill are turned off.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings, the toggles for 'Autocomplete searches and URLs' (under Sync and Google services), 'Addresses and more', and 'Payment methods' (under Autofill) are in the OFF position.

task_completion.description: Verify the default download directory and prompt setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings (Downloads section), the location is set to end with 'Documents/Arrangement_Files' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' is turned ON.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom search engine shortcut is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings (Search engines -> Manage search engines and site search), there is a site search entry with the keyword 'obit' and the URL 'https://www.legacy.com/search?q=%s'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome browser GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Chrome browser interface (Settings, History, Bookmark Manager) rather than using terminal commands to edit SQLite databases or JSON files directly.

integrity.description: Verify settings are applied in the browser, not just typed in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes must be visible within the actual Chrome application windows, not merely written out in a text editor or terminal echo command.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not run a pre-written script to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show the execution of python or bash scripts designed to automatically modify Chrome profile files (e.g., Preferences, Bookmarks, History).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target sensitive family names for history deletion: Patterson, Smith, Hernandez, and O'Connor. Personal bookmarks to delete: Netflix, Amazon, Facebook, DraftKings, and Reddit. Expected professional bookmark folders: Merchandise, Cemeteries, Florists, and Vital Statistics. Required download directory: Arrangement_Files. Target custom search engine keyword: 'obit' pointing to 'https://www.legacy.com/search?q=%s'.
